stories.title: Sinner vs Pellegrino — ATP Rome R16 (Campo Centrale, 3 PM CEST)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Jannik Sinner vs Italian wildcard Andrea Pellegrino — today, Rome R4 (3 PM CEST, Campo Centrale).

30-match M1000 streak. 25-0 in Masters 1000 this season. One step from a Career Golden Masters QF. 🇮🇹

#Tennis #ItalianOpen #Sinner

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Sinner is 25-0 in Masters 1000 matches in 2026. His streak of 30 straight M1000 wins ties for 2nd all-time.

Rome is the only M1000 he has never won. Every win here is history. 🏆

#ItalianOpen #Sinner #Tennis

stories.title: Swiatek Retires vs Rybakina in WTA Rome QF (2-6, 7-6(3), 2-2 ret.)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
SWIATEK RETIRES 🚨

Elena Rybakina def. Iga Swiatek 2-6, 7-6(3), 2-2 ret. in the Rome QF.

Second straight early exit for Swiatek. Roland Garros qualifying starts in 6 days. Massive question marks.

#WTARome #Swiatek #ItalianOpen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Swiatek retires in Rome. Sabalenka already gone. The WTA draw at Roland Garros just got a lot more interesting.

Rybakina is in the Rome SF — and suddenly the favourite in Paris. 🎾

#RolandGarros #Rybakina #Tennis

x_posts.label: Post 3-1

WTA Rome QF tonight: Coco Gauff vs Mirra Andreeva (7 PM CEST, Campo Centrale).

Gauff leads H2H 4-0, 3-0 on clay. Can Andreeva finally break through?

#WTARome #Gauff #Andreeva #ItalianOpen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Sorana Cirstea: 36 years old. Final season. Still standing in Rome.

Beat No. 1 Sabalenka. Beat Noskova. Now faces Ostapenko in the QF.

The Cinderella run is not over yet. 🌹

#WTARome #Cirstea #ItalianOpen #Tennis

Sinner vs Pellegrino is this afternoon. #ItalianOpen #Rome2026 #Tennis

Roland Garros qualifying starts in 6 days (May 18).

The picture heading into Paris:
❌ Alcaraz — out (wrist)
⚠️ Swiatek — just retired in Rome QF
✅ Sinner — 25-0 in M1000, clear favourite
✅ Rybakina — Rome SF, surging

#RolandGarros #FrenchOpen #Tennis

article.headline: Roland Garros 2026: 13 Days Out, and the French Open Draw Just Got Wide Open
